epigraph.quote: we had a delicious supper at J Jays at 5-ways, although we were wearing old clothes.

per_stop.quote: Mr Loach showed us how he spun metal – like a potter or wood lathe.
We drove on to Tyburn Rd to see "Executive Decision", which we enjoyed.
we had a delicious supper at J Jays at 5-ways, although we were wearing old clothes.
